name: Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pints cherry tomatoes, seeded and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bow tie noodles according to package directions, then drain and cool.
2. Whisk together olive oil, minced garlic, juice from 1 lemon, and 1/2 cup red wine vinegar until slightly thickened.
3. Mix the dressing into the cooled pasta.
4. Slice black olives, halve cherry tomatoes, and tear spinach into bite-sized pieces.
5. Add the prepared vegetables to the pasta mixture.
6. Crumble feta cheese into the salad and gently mix.
7. Season with oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
